name: drawio
description: Local draw.io plugin that groups built-in diagramming skills for template-aware drawing and library selection.

interface.shortDescription: Draw.io plugin with template-aware diagramming skills.
interface.longDescription: Bundle local draw.io skills for generating diagrams with built-in template libraries, stencil libraries, and named shape packs on this PC.
defaultPrompt: Create a draw.io admin dashboard with Bootstrap shapes.
Choose the best built-in draw.io library for this architecture diagram.
Explain which draw.io template families are available on this PC.
